mapper.select:
select * from levelUpBBS where 1 = 1
and lvlStatus <= 3
and ((lvlUid = #{uId} and lvlStatus = 1) or lvlOriUid = #{uId})
order by lvlRef desc, lvlPos asc
select * from levelUpBBS where lvlStatus = 1 order by lvlRef desc, lvlPos asc
mapper.insert: insert into levelUpBBS ( lvlUid, lvlTitle, lvlContent, lvlName, lvlSns, lvlRegDate, lvlPos, lvlRef, lvlDepth, lvlFileName, lvlFileSize, lvlStatus, lvlOriUid, createdDate, createdBy, updatedDate, updatedBy ) values ( #{lvlUid}, #{lvlTitle}, #{lvlContent}, #{lvlName}, #{lvlSns}, now(), #{lvlPos}, #{lvlRef}, #{lvlDepth}, #{lvlFileName}, #{lvlFileSize}, #{lvlStatus}, #{lvlOriUid}, current_timestamp, coalesce(#{createdBy}, #{lvlUid}), current_timestamp, coalesce(#{updatedBy}, #{lvlUid}) )
mapper.update: update levelUpBBS set lvlTitle = #{lvlTitle}, lvlContent = #{lvlContent}, lvlName = #{lvlName}, lvlSns = #{lvlSns}, updatedDate = current_timestamp, updatedBy = coalesce(#{updatedBy}, #{lvlUid}) where lvlNum = #{lvlNum}
update levelUpBBS set lvlStatus = #{status}, updatedDate = current_timestamp where lvlNum = #{lvlNum}
